claim: Computer use API lets models see screenshots and control mouse/keyboard, automating multi-step UI workflows end-to-end
actionable: For UI-heavy workflows, use computer use API to automate by analyzing screenshots and executing actions
source_title: Anthropic Computer Use - Hands On Tutorial

claim: Including OCR text and bounding box coordinates with screenshots improves model accuracy for precise UI element targeting
actionable: When using computer use API, provide OCR text + bounding boxes alongside screenshots for more accurate clicks
source_title: Anthropic Computer Use - Hands On Tutorial
